description: Two-panel statistics graphic split by a diagonal grey divider. The top panel shows Trump standing in an interior in a dark navy suit, light blue tie, and flag lapel pin, beside a gilded eagle finial and greenery; overlaid white text reads '2.5 MILLION' (large), then 'Native Born Americans Gained Employment', with smaller text 'Over the past year'. The bottom panel shows Trump walking on grass, pointing, with vehicles and trees behind; overlaid is a red box with white text '670,000' and white text 'Foreign Born Workers Lost Employment' plus 'Over the past year'. An engraved 'The WHITE HOUSE' logo is at the top right and small 'BLS' text is at the bottom right. The top figure is in white; the bottom figure is in red.
notable_text: 2.5 MILLION Native Born Americans Gained Employment Over the past year; 670,000 Foreign Born Workers Lost Employment Over the past year; The WHITE HOUSE; BLS
